query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a young child with light brown hair and bright blue eyes looking upward and toward the right. The child has straight bangs across the forehead, visible freckles on the cheeks, and natural skin texture. The background is dark and indistinct, and the image is tightly cropped to show the face and upper neck.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a young child with light brown hair and bright blue eyes rendered in a muted, desaturated sepia-toned palette. The child looks upward with a wide-eyed expression conveying fear or anxiety, while harsh lighting casts deep shadows across the face and creates specular highlights on the skin, contributing to an oppressive and eerie atmosphere. The composition employs a slight tilt and tight cropping, introducing instability and unease.
